name: Cookie Monster
help: Beacon Object File (BOF) that locates and copies browser cookie and login data files for Edge, Chrome, and Firefox. Extracts WebKit Master Key and App Bound Encryption Key, uses fileless retrieval via handle duplication, and supports decryption without injecting into the browser (e.g. --system mode).

arguments.name: chrome
arguments.desc: Target Chrome; find process with handle to cookies and copy file to CWD (0 or 1)

arguments.name: edge
arguments.desc: Target Edge; find process with handle to cookies and copy file to CWD (0 or 1)

arguments.name: system
arguments.desc: Decrypt app bound encryption key without injecting into browser (0 or 1)

arguments.name: firefox
arguments.desc: Target Firefox; find profiles.ini and locate key4.db and logins.json (0 or 1)

arguments.name: chromeCookiePID
arguments.desc: Chrome PID with handle to cookies; duplicate handle and copy file (0 or 1)

arguments.name: chromeLoginDataPID
arguments.desc: Chrome PID with handle to Login Data; duplicate handle and copy file (0 or 1)

arguments.name: edgeCookiePID
arguments.desc: Edge PID with handle to cookies; duplicate handle and copy file (0 or 1)

arguments.name: edgeLoginDataPID
arguments.desc: Edge PID with handle to Login Data; duplicate handle and copy file (0 or 1)

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Path to Local State file (required when using --system)

arguments.name: keyOnly
arguments.desc: Only retrieve the app bound encryption key; do not download Cookie or Login Data files (0 or 1)

arguments.name: cookieOnly
arguments.desc: Only retrieve the Cookie file; do not download Login Data or retrieve encryption key (0 or 1)

arguments.name: loginDataOnly
arguments.desc: Only retrieve the Login Data file; do not download Cookie file or retrieve encryption key (0 or 1)

arguments.name: copyFile
arguments.desc: Copy Cookie and Login Data to the specified folder (no fileless retrieval)
